steps.title: Undo the vertical shift
steps.content: The graph shown is $y=f(x)+4$. To recover $f(x)$, subtract $4$ from the displayed graph's equation.

steps.title: Apply the graph information
steps.content: From the graph, $y=f(x)+4$ has form: $$ y=-6^x+9 $$ Subtract $4$: $$ f(x)=-6^x+9-4=-6^x+5 $$ The answer is B.
